revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:World topic/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:World topic/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:World topic/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:World topic/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:World topic/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:World topic/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) --> {{lua|Module:World topic}} == Basic usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{World topic |name = {{subst:PAGENAME}} |prefix = <!-- Mandatory --> |suffix = |image = |above = |noredlinks = <!-- Set to a non-blank value to suppress redlinks --> }} </syntaxhighlight>
''Prefix'' is what is added before each country listed. Thus "prefix=Music of" creates "Music of Africa", etc.
== Additional parameters == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> |title = <!-- Leave blank for default: "{{{prefix}}} the World" --> |group1 = <!-- Leave blank for default: "Countries" --> </syntaxhighlight>
''Title'' is the table heading (top). ''Group1'' is the row heading (left).
== Overriding the style == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> |titlestyle = |bodystyle = |abovestyle = |belowstyle = |groupstyle = |liststyle = |border = <!--To remove the border: "child"--> |navbar = <!--To remove the navigation bar: "plain"--> </syntaxhighlight>
== See also == {{Continent-based templates}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Topics templates by region or continent| ]] [[Category:Configurable area-topic templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) --> {{lua|Module:World topic}} == Basic usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{World topic |name = {{subst:PAGENAME}} |prefix = <!-- Mandatory --> |suffix = |image = |above = |noredlinks = <!-- Set to a non-blank value to suppress redlinks --> }} </syntaxhighlight>
''Prefix'' is what is added before each country listed. Thus "prefix=Music of" creates "Music of Africa", etc.
== Additional parameters == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> |title = <!-- Leave blank for default: "{{{prefix}}} the World" --> |group1 = <!-- Leave blank for default: "Countries" --> </syntaxhighlight>
''Title'' is the table heading (top). ''Group1'' is the row heading (left).
== Overriding the style == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> |titlestyle = |bodystyle = |abovestyle = |belowstyle = |groupstyle = |liststyle = |border = <!--To remove the border: "child"--> |navbar = <!--To remove the navigation bar: "plain"--> </syntaxhighlight>
== See also == {{Continent-based templates}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Topics templates by region or continent| ]] [[:en:Category:Configurable area-topic templates|Category:Configurable area-topic templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) --> {{lua|Module:World topic}} == Basic usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{World topic |name = {{subst:PAGENAME}} |prefix = <!-- Mandatory --> |suffix = |image = |above = |noredlinks = <!-- Set to a non-blank value to suppress redlinks --> }} </syntaxhighlight>
''Prefix'' is what is added before each country listed. Thus "prefix=Music of" creates "Music of Africa", etc.
== Additional parameters == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> |title = <!-- Leave blank for default: "{{{prefix}}} the World" --> |group1 = <!-- Leave blank for default: "Countries" --> </syntaxhighlight>
''Title'' is the table heading (top). ''Group1'' is the row heading (left).
== Overriding the style == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> |titlestyle = |bodystyle = |abovestyle = |belowstyle = |groupstyle = |liststyle = |border = <!--To remove the border: "child"--> |navbar = <!--To remove the navigation bar: "plain"--> </syntaxhighlight>
== See also == {{Continent-based templates}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Topics templates by region or continent| ]] [[:en:Category:Configurable area-topic templates|Category:Configurable area-topic templates]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) --> {{lua|Module:World topic}} == Basic usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{World topic |name = {{subst:PAGENAME}} |prefix = <!-- Mandatory --> |suffix = |image = |above = |noredlinks = <!-- Set to a non-blank value to suppress redlinks --> }} </syntaxhighlight>
''Prefix'' is what is added before each country listed. Thus "prefix=Music of" creates "Music of Africa", etc.
== Additional parameters == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> |title = <!-- Leave blank for default: "{{{prefix}}} the World" --> |group1 = <!-- Leave blank for default: "Countries" --> </syntaxhighlight>
''Title'' is the table heading (top). ''Group1'' is the row heading (left).
== Overriding the style == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> |titlestyle = |bodystyle = |abovestyle = |belowstyle = |groupstyle = |liststyle = |border = <!--To remove the border: "child"--> |navbar = <!--To remove the navigation bar: "plain"--> </syntaxhighlight>
== See also == {{Continent-based templates}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Topics templates by region or continent| ]] [[:en:Category:Configurable area-topic templates|Category:Configurable area-topic templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) --> {{lua|Module:World topic}} == Basic usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{World topic |name = {{subst:PAGENAME}} |prefix = <!-- Mandatory --> |suffix = |image = |above = |noredlinks = <!-- Set to a non-blank value to suppress redlinks --> }} </syntaxhighlight>
''Prefix'' is what is added before each country listed. Thus "prefix=Music of" creates "Music of Africa", etc.
== Additional parameters == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> |title = <!-- Leave blank for default: "{{{prefix}}} the World" --> |group1 = <!-- Leave blank for default: "Countries" --> </syntaxhighlight>
''Title'' is the table heading (top). ''Group1'' is the row heading (left).
== Overriding the style == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> |titlestyle = |bodystyle = |abovestyle = |belowstyle = |groupstyle = |liststyle = |border = <!--To remove the border: "child"--> |navbar = <!--To remove the navigation bar: "plain"--> </syntaxhighlight>
== See also == {{Continent-based templates}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Topics templates by region or continent| ]] [[:en:Category:Configurable area-topic templates|Category:Configurable area-topic templates]] }}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) --> {{lua|Module:World topic}} == Basic usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{World topic |name = {{subst:PAGENAME}} |prefix = <!-- Mandatory --> |suffix = |image = |above = |noredlinks = <!-- Set to a non-blank value to suppress redlinks --> }} </syntaxhighlight>
''Prefix'' is what is added before each country listed. Thus "prefix=Music of" creates "Music of Africa", etc.
== Additional parameters == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> |title = <!-- Leave blank for default: "{{{prefix}}} the World" --> |group1 = <!-- Leave blank for default: "Countries" --> </syntaxhighlight>
''Title'' is the table heading (top). ''Group1'' is the row heading (left).
== Overriding the style == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> |titlestyle = |bodystyle = |abovestyle = |belowstyle = |groupstyle = |liststyle = |border = <!--To remove the border: "child"--> |navbar = <!--To remove the navigation bar: "plain"--> </syntaxhighlight>
== See also == {{Continent-based templates}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[:en:Category:Configurable area-topic templates|Category:Configurable area-topic templates]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Topics templates by region or continent| ]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}}
{{lua|Module:World topic}} == Basic usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{World topic |name = {{subst:PAGENAME}} |prefix = |suffix = |image = |above = |noredlinks = }} </syntaxhighlight>
''Prefix'' is what is added before each country listed. Thus "prefix=Music of" creates "Music of Africa", etc.
== Additional parameters == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> |title = |group1 = </syntaxhighlight>
''Title'' is the table heading (top). ''Group1'' is the row heading (left).
== Overriding the style == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> |titlestyle = |bodystyle = |abovestyle = |belowstyle = |groupstyle = |liststyle = |border = |navbar = </syntaxhighlight>
== See also == {{Continent-based templates}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
[[:en:Category:Configurable area-topic templates|Category:Configurable area-topic templates]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Topics templates by region or continent| ]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
